config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c' AND event.after.Level = 0,'MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID}) MATCH (e:Evidence {EvidenceID: event.after.EvidenceID}) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_EVIDENCE]->(e) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate, r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy', event.op = 'u' AND event.before.Level = 0,'MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[r:HAS_EVIDENCE]->(e:Evidence {EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID}) SET r.Remark = event.before.Remark, r.CreatedDate = event.before.CreatedDate, r.CreatedBy = event.before.CreatedBy', event.op = 'd' AND event.before.Level = 0,'MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[r:HAS_EVIDENCE]->(e:Evidence {EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID}) DELETE r'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
